This paper proposes a Layer-Based Facial Template Inversion (LBFTI) method to reconstruct identity-preserving fine-grained face images. Our scheme decomposes face images into three layers: foreground layers (including eyebrows, eyes, nose, and mouth), midground layers (skin), and background layers (other parts). LBFTI leverages dedicated generators to produce these layers, adopting a rigorous three-stage training strategy: (1) independent refined generation of foreground and midground layers, (2) fusion of foreground and midground layers with template secondary injection to produce complete panoramic face images with background layers, and (3) joint fine-tuning of all modules to optimize inter-layer coordination and identity consistency. Experiments demonstrate that our LBFTI not only outperforms state-of-the-art methods in machine authentication performance, with a 25.3% improvement in TAR, but also achieves better similarity in human perception, as validated by both quantitative metrics and a questionnaire survey.

</details>


### [259] [EAST: Early Action Prediction Sampling Strategy with Token Masking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18367)
*Iva Sović,Ivan Martinović,Marin Oršić*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: EAST是一个早期动作预测框架，通过随机化训练策略使单个模型能泛化到所有测试观察比例，并结合观察与未来表示联合学习提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 早期动作预测在动作完全展开前进行预测非常困难，因为视觉证据有限。需要一种能够处理不完整观察的方法。

Method: 提出随机化训练策略，采样分离观察帧和未观察帧的时间步；采用观察和未来表示联合学习；提出令牌掩码程序减少内存使用和加速训练。

Result: 在NTU60、SSv2和UCF101数据集上分别超越先前最佳工作10.1、7.7和3.9个百分点，实现新的SOTA。

Conclusion: EAST框架通过简单高效的设计，显著提升了早期动作预测的性能，并通过创新训练策略解决了模型泛化到不同观察比例的问题。

Abstract: Early action prediction seeks to anticipate an action before it fully unfolds, but limited visual evidence makes this task especially challenging. We introduce EAST, a simple and efficient framework that enables a model to reason about incomplete observations. In our empirical study, we identify key components when training early action prediction models. Our key contribution is a randomized training strategy that samples a time step separating observed and unobserved video frames, enabling a single model to generalize seamlessly across all test-time observation ratios. We further show that joint learning on both observed and future (oracle) representations significantly boosts performance, even allowing an encoder-only model to excel. To improve scalability, we propose a token masking procedure that cuts memory usage in half and accelerates training by 2x with negligible accuracy loss. Combined with a forecasting decoder, EAST sets a new state of the art on NTU60, SSv2, and UCF101, surpassing previous best work by 10.1, 7.7, and 3.9 percentage points, respectively.

</details>


### [260] [DSA-CycleGAN: A Domain Shift Aware CycleGAN for Robust Multi-Stain Glomeruli Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18368)
*Zeeshan Nisar,Friedrich Feuerhake,Thomas Lampert*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Domain Shift Aware CycleGAN (DSA-CycleGAN)来解决数字病理学中多染色分割任务中CycleGAN染色转移时产生的噪声问题，提高肾小球分割性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数字病理学分割中，不同染色之间的差异会降低模型性能。标注每种染色既昂贵又耗时，因此使用CycleGAN进行染色转移的方法被开发出来，但CycleGAN由于某些染色对的一对多特性会在转换过程中引入噪声，这与循环一致性损失相冲突。

Method: 提出Domain Shift Aware CycleGAN (DSA-CycleGAN)，减少染色转换过程中的噪声。同时评估了机器学习领域其他解决类似问题的方法，并将其与DSA-CycleGAN在多染色肾小球分割任务中的效果进行比较。

Result: 实验表明，DSA-CycleGAN不仅提高了肾小球分割的性能，而且在减少噪声方面优于其他方法，特别是在生物学上差异较大的染色之间转换时效果更明显。

Conclusion: DSA-CycleGAN能有效解决CycleGAN在染色转移中引入噪声的问题，显著提升多染色分割模型的性能，特别是在生物学差异较大的染色对之间。

Abstract: A key challenge in segmentation in digital histopathology is inter- and intra-stain variations as it reduces model performance. Labelling each stain is expensive and time-consuming so methods using stain transfer via CycleGAN, have been developed for training multi-stain segmentation models using labels from a single stain. Nevertheless, CycleGAN tends to introduce noise during translation because of the one-to-many nature of some stain pairs, which conflicts with its cycle consistency loss. To address this, we propose the Domain Shift Aware CycleGAN, which reduces the presence of such noise. Furthermore, we evaluate several advances from the field of machine learning aimed at resolving similar problems and compare their effectiveness against DSA-CycleGAN in the context of multi-stain glomeruli segmentation. Experiments demonstrate that DSA-CycleGAN not only improves segmentation performance in glomeruli segmentation but also outperforms other methods in reducing noise. This is particularly evident when translating between biologically distinct stains. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/zeeshannisar/DSA-CycleGAN.

</details>


### [261] [Towards Robust Text-to-Image Person Retrieval: Multi-View Reformulation for Semantic Compensation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18376)
*Chao Yuan,Yujian Zhao,Haoxuan Xu,Guanglin Niu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）驱动的语义补偿框架（MVR），通过多视图语义重构和特征补偿来解决文本到图像人物检索中的表达漂移问题，无需训练即可提升原始模型的准确性，在三个数据集上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 文本到图像人物检索任务中，自然语言表达的多样性和视觉语义的隐含性导致表达漂移问题——语义等价的文本由于措辞变化在嵌入空间中表现出显著特征差异，从而降低了图像-文本对齐的鲁棒性。

Method: 1. 多视图重构（MVR）：采用双分支提示策略，结合关键特征引导（通过特征相似性提取视觉关键组件）和多样性感知重写，生成语义等价但分布多样的文本变体；2. 文本特征鲁棒性增强：通过无训练的潜在空间补偿机制，利用多视图特征均值池化和残差连接抑制噪声干扰，有效捕捉"语义回声"；3. 视觉语义补偿：使用视觉语言模型生成多视角图像描述，并通过共享文本重构进一步增强，以解决视觉语义差距。

Result: 实验表明，该方法无需训练即可显著提升原始模型的准确性，在三个文本到图像人物检索数据集上达到最先进的性能（SOTA）。

Conclusion: 提出的MVR框架通过LLM驱动的多视图语义补偿，有效缓解了表达漂移问题，增强了跨模态表示的一致性，为文本到图像人物检索提供了无需训练的鲁棒性增强方案。

Abstract: In text-to-image person retrieval tasks, the diversity of natural language expressions and the implicitness of visual semantics often lead to the problem of Expression Drift, where semantically equivalent texts exhibit significant feature discrepancies in the embedding space due to phrasing variations, thereby degrading the robustness of image-text alignment. This paper proposes a semantic compensation framework (MVR) driven by Large Language Models (LLMs), which enhances cross-modal representation consistency through multi-view semantic reformulation and feature compensation. The core methodology comprises three components: Multi-View Reformulation (MVR): A dual-branch prompting strategy combines key feature guidance (extracting visually critical components via feature similarity) and diversity-aware rewriting to generate semantically equivalent yet distributionally diverse textual variants; Textual Feature Robustness Enhancement: A training-free latent space compensation mechanism suppresses noise interference through multi-view feature mean-pooling and residual connections, effectively capturing "Semantic Echoes"; Visual Semantic Compensation: VLM generates multi-perspective image descriptions, which are further enhanced through shared text reformulation to address visual semantic gaps. Experiments demonstrate that our method can improve the accuracy of the original model well without training and performs SOTA on three text-to-image person retrieval datasets.

</details>


### [262] [One-Step Diffusion with Inverse Residual Fields for Unsupervised Industrial Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18393)
*Boan Zhang,Wen Li,Guanhua Yu,Xiyang Liu,Wenchao Chen,Long Tian*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出OSD-IRF方法，通过逆残差场实现一步扩散，在工业异常检测中达到SOTA性能并提升推理速度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统扩散模型在无监督工业异常检测中表现优异，但迭代去噪过程导致推理速度慢，需要解决这一瓶颈

Method: 训练无条件DDPM，基于噪声估计预测逆残差场(IRF)，通过IRF的高斯分布概率密度进行异常检测，仅需单步扩散

Result: 在三个基准测试上达到SOTA或竞争性性能，六个指标表现优异，推理速度提升约2倍且无需蒸馏

Conclusion: OSD-IRF通过逆残差场空间实现高效异常检测，在IRF空间中异常可区分，单步扩散大幅提升推理速度

Abstract: Diffusion models have achieved outstanding performance in unsupervised industrial anomaly detection (uIAD) by learning a manifold of normal data under the common assumption that off-manifold anomalies are harder to generate, resulting in larger reconstruction errors in data space or lower probability densities in the tractable latent space. However, their iterative denoising and noising nature leads to slow inference. In this paper, we propose OSD-IRF, a novel one-step diffusion with inverse residual fields, to address this limitation for uIAD task. We first train a deep diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM) on normal data without any conditioning. Then, for a test sample, we predict its inverse residual fields (IRF) based on the noise estimated by the well-trained parametric noise function of the DDPM. Finally, uIAD is performed by evaluating the probability density of the IRF under a Gaussian distribution and comparing it with a threshold. Our key observation is that anomalies become distinguishable in this IRF space, a finding that has seldom been reported in prior works. Moreover, OSD-IRF requires only single step diffusion for uIAD, thanks to the property that IRF holds for any neighboring time step in the denoising process. Extensive experiments on three widely used uIAD benchmarks show that our model achieves SOTA or competitive performance across six metrics, along with roughly a 2X inference speedup without distillation.

</details>


### [263] [MedProbeBench: Systematic Benchmarking at Deep Evidence Integration for Expert-level Medical Guideline](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18418)
*Jiyao Liu,Jianghan Shen,Sida Song,Tianbin Li,Xiaojia Liu,Rongbin Li,Ziyan Huang,Jiashi Lin,Junzhi Ning,Changkai Ji,Siqi Luo,Wenjie Li,Chenglong Ma,Ming Hu,Jing Xiong,Jin Ye,Bin Fu,Ningsheng Xu,Yirong Chen,Lei Jin,Hong Chen,Junjun He*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MedProbeBench：首个基于高质量临床指南的基准测试，用于评估深度研究系统在医学证据整合和指南生成方面的能力，揭示当前模型与专家水平之间的显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准无法评估深度研究系统在现实医学工作流程中所需的复杂证据整合和专家级判断能力，特别是在临床指南开发这样的关键医学任务上。

Method: 引入MedProbeBench基准，利用高质量临床指南作为专家级参考标准，并开发MedProbe-Eval评估框架，包含：1）包含1200+任务自适应标准项的整体评估量表；2）基于5130+原子声明的细粒度证据验证机制。

Result: 对17个LLM和深度研究代理的评估显示，在证据整合和指南生成方面存在显著差距，当前能力与专家级临床指南开发水平之间仍有很大距离。

Conclusion: MedProbeBench为评估医学深度研究系统提供了首个高质量基准，揭示了当前系统在复杂医学证据整合方面的不足，为未来研究指明了方向。

Abstract: Recent advances in deep research systems enable large language models to retrieve, synthesize, and reason over large-scale external knowledge. In medicine, developing clinical guidelines critically depends on such deep evidence integration. However, existing benchmarks fail to evaluate this capability in realistic workflows requiring multi-step evidence integration and expert-level judgment. To address this gap, we introduce MedProbeBench, the first benchmark leveraging high-quality clinical guidelines as expert-level references. Medical guidelines, with their rigorous standards in neutrality and verifiability, represent the pinnacle of medical expertise and pose substantial challenges for deep research agents. For evaluation, we propose MedProbe-Eval, a comprehensive evaluation framework featuring: (1) Holistic Rubrics with 1,200+ task-adaptive rubric criteria for comprehensive quality assessment, and (2) Fine-grained Evidence Verification for rigorous validation of evidence precision, grounded in 5,130+ atomic claims. Evaluation of 17 LLMs and deep research agents reveals critical gaps in evidence integration and guideline generation, underscoring the substantial distance between current capabilities and expert-level clinical guideline development. Project: https://github.com/uni-medical/MedProbeBench

</details>


### [264] [Revisiting Change VQA in Remote Sensing with Structured and Native Multimodal Qwen Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18429)
*Yakoub Bazi,Mohamad M. Al Rahhal,Mansour Zuair,Faroun Mohamed*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究重新评估了CDVQA基准，使用Qwen系列模型在统一LoRA设置下进行实验，发现原生多模态模型比结构化视觉语言流水线在遥感图像语义变化推理任务上表现更好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在时序遥感图像理解中已有研究，但Change VQA任务在现代多模态模型背景下仍未被充分探索。该研究旨在重新评估CDVQA基准，比较不同架构的Qwen模型在语义变化问答任务上的表现。

Method: 在统一的低秩适应(LoRA)设置下，使用Qwen3-VL（结构化视觉语言流水线，具有多深度视觉条件和全注意力解码器）和Qwen3.5（原生多模态模型，采用单阶段对齐和混合解码器骨干）在CDVQA基准上进行实验比较。

Result: 实验结果显示：1) 近期VLM相比早期专门基线有所改进；2) 性能并不随模型规模单调扩展；3) 原生多模态模型比结构化视觉语言流水线在该任务上更有效。

Conclusion: 紧密集成的多模态骨干对遥感图像中语言驱动的语义变化推理任务的贡献比模型规模或显式的多深度视觉条件更重要。这为未来遥感图像理解任务的多模态模型设计提供了指导。

Abstract: Change visual question answering (Change VQA) addresses the problem of answering natural-language questions about semantic changes between bi-temporal remote sensing (RS) images. Although vision-language models (VLMs) have recently been studied for temporal RS image understanding, Change VQA remains underexplored in the context of modern multimodal models. In this letter, we revisit the CDVQA benchmark using recent Qwen models under a unified low-rank adaptation (LoRA) setting. We compare Qwen3-VL, which follows a structured vision-language pipeline with multi-depth visual conditioning and a full-attention decoder, with Qwen3.5, a native multimodal model that combines a single-stage alignment with a hybrid decoder backbone. Experimental results on the official CDVQA test splits show that recent VLMs improve over earlier specialized baselines. They further show that performance does not scale monotonically with model size, and that native multimodal models are more effective than structured vision-language pipelines for this task. These findings indicate that tightly integrated multimodal backbones contribute more to performance than scale or explicit multi-depth visual conditioning for language-driven semantic change reasoning in RS imagery.

</details>


### [265] [ESsEN: Training Compact Discriminative Vision-Language Transformers in a Low-Resource Setting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18452)
*Clayton Fields,Casey Kennington*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种轻量级视觉语言模型ESsEN，在低资源环境下表现优异，通过双塔架构和卷积网络实现参数效率，使视觉语言建模更易普及。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉语言模型通常有数十亿参数，不适用于边缘设备或独立机器人平台等需要小型模型的场景。现有研究缺乏轻量级模型训练和小数据集训练方法，需要解决这些问题。

Method: 1. 比较双塔编码器与单塔编码器在低资源设置下的性能；2. 将传统卷积网络融入双塔Transformer架构以提高参数效率；3. 探索跨模态融合模块的不同形状和大小；4. 提出ESsEN模型，可端到端训练且参数较少。

Result: 1. 双塔编码器在低资源英语判别任务中优于单塔编码器；2. 卷积网络融入能有效提升参数效率；3. 跨模态融合模块可大幅变化而不影响性能；4. ESsEN模型在多项任务上仅用少量参数就能达到与其他模型相当的性能。

Conclusion: 通过系统研究，论文展示了轻量级视觉语言模型的可行性，提出的ESsEN模型和实验工具使视觉语言建模对更广泛的研究人员更加可及，特别是在资源受限的环境中。

Abstract: Vision-language modeling is rapidly increasing in popularity with an ever expanding list of available models. In most cases, these vision-language models have parameters in the tens of billions, which is necessary for some needs, but in many cases smaller models are necessary (e.g., on edge devices or independent robotic platforms). Unfortunately, there is little research in producing light-weight models or in training them with small datasets. Inspired by the language learning progression and data sparsity in child development, in this paper, we address both of these goals in a systematic fashion. We show that two-tower encoder models are superior to one-tower encoders in low-resource settings for discriminative English tasks. We show also that incorporating traditional convolutional networks into the two-tower transformer architecture can help produce parameter efficient vision-language models. Finally, we show that the cross-modal fusion module of two-tower encoders can vary significantly in shape and size while producing the same results. In addition, we present ESsEN, a compact vision-language model that can be trained end-to-end with relatively few resources that performs as well on several tasks with only a fraction of the parameters compared to other models. The experimental results and the tools we present here make vision-language modeling more accessible to a wider variety of researchers.

</details>


### [266] [Progressive Online Video Understanding with Evidence-Aligned Timing and Transparent Decisions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18459)
*Kecheng Zhang,Zongxin Yang,Mingfei Han,Haihong Hao,Yunzhi Zhuge,Changlin Li,Junhan Zhao,Zhihui Li,Xiaojun Chang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种用于在线视频理解的新框架，通过解耦推理控制与记忆整合，实现透明、证据对齐的流式视频分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统视频LLM在离线评估中忽略了在视频流中首次出现足够证据时精确响应的关键能力。在线流式范式面临决策不透明、响应时间与视觉证据对齐困难、以及在有限计算预算下保持全局因果一致理解等挑战。

Method: 提出包含两个核心组件的框架：1）主动思考决策器（ATDM）——使用可观测进度和置信度指标外部化决策过程，精确匹配首次充分证据时间戳；2）分层渐进语义整合（HPSI）——使用可学习的多级聚合令牌跨片段传播，构建丰富的全局认知状态。

Result: 在StreamingBench基准上将先前SOTA准确率从67.63%提升至71.60%，在OVOBench上达到46.9%，为在线视频分析提供了稳健的解决方案。

Conclusion: 该框架通过解耦推理控制与记忆整合，实现了透明、证据对齐的在线视频理解，为流式视频分析设定了新标准。

Abstract: Visual agents operating in the wild must respond to queries precisely when sufficient evidence first appears in a video stream, a critical capability that is overlooked by conventional video LLMs evaluated in offline settings. The shift to an online, streaming paradigm introduces significant challenges: a lack of decision transparency, the difficulty of aligning response timing with visual evidence, and the need to maintain a global, causally consistent understanding under tight computational budgets. To address these issues, we propose a novel framework that decouples reasoning control from memory integration. We introduce \textbf{\model{}}, an instantiation of this framework with two core components. First, the \emph{Active Thinking Decision Maker (ATDM)} is a transparent reasoning controller that externalizes its decision process using observable progress ($\boldsymbolρ$) and confidence ($\boldsymbol{c}$) metrics. This allows it to precisely time its response $t_r$ to match the first-sufficient-evidence timestamp $t^\star$ while streaming its reasoning to the user. Second, the \emph{Hierarchical Progressive Semantic Integration (HPSI)} module acts as an efficient memory system. It employs a set of learnable, multi-level aggregation tokens that are propagated across clips to build a rich, global cognitive state without exceeding token budgets. %Our approach sets a new standard on key online video understanding benchmarks, achieving strong performance of \textbf{71.6\%} on StreamingBench and \textbf{46.9\%} on OVOBench, demonstrating a robust solution for evidence-aligned and transparent online video analysis. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of ATDM and HPSI, e.g., Thinking-QwenVL improves the accuracy of the previous state-of-the-art from 67.63\% to 71.60\% on the StreamingBench benchmark.

</details>


### [267] [SemLT3D: Semantic-Guided Expert Distillation for Camera-only Long-Tailed 3D Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18476)
*Hao Vo,Khoa Vo,Thinh Phan,Ngo Xuan Cuong,Gianfranco Doretto,Hien Nguyen,Anh Nguyen,Ngan Le*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SemLT3D：基于语义引导的专家蒸馏框架，通过语言引导的专家混合模块和语义投影蒸馏，提升基于相机的3D物体检测在长尾类别上的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于相机的3D物体检测方法主要关注整体性能，忽略了现实世界数据中严重的长尾不平衡问题。许多罕见但安全关键的类别（如儿童、婴儿车、应急车辆）样本极少，导致学习偏差和性能下降。此外，类间模糊性（视觉相似的子类）和类内多样性（外观、尺度、姿态、上下文变化大）进一步阻碍了可靠的长尾识别。

Method: 提出SemLT3D框架，包含两个核心组件：1）语言引导的专家混合模块：根据3D查询的语义亲和度将其路由到专门的专家网络，以更好地区分混淆类别并专门处理尾部分布；2）语义投影蒸馏管道：将3D查询与CLIP信息化的2D语义对齐，产生跨多样化视觉表现的更一致和判别性特征。

Result: 虽然主要针对长尾不平衡问题，但SemLT3D中的语义结构化学习也提高了在更广泛的外观变化和具有挑战性的极端情况下的鲁棒性，为更可靠的基于相机的3D感知提供了原则性进展。

Conclusion: SemLT3D通过语义引导的专家蒸馏框架，有效解决了基于相机的3D物体检测中的长尾不平衡问题，不仅提升了罕见类别的识别性能，还增强了模型在各种视觉变化下的鲁棒性。

Abstract: Camera-only 3D object detection has emerged as a cost-effective and scalable alternative to LiDAR for autonomous driving, yet existing methods primarily prioritize overall performance while overlooking the severe long-tail imbalance inherent in real-world datasets. In practice, many rare but safety-critical categories such as children, strollers, or emergency vehicles are heavily underrepresented, leading to biased learning and degraded performance. This challenge is further exacerbated by pronounced inter-class ambiguity (e.g., visually similar subclasses) and substantial intra-class diversity (e.g., objects varying widely in appearance, scale, pose, or context), which together hinder reliable long-tail recognition. In this work, we introduce SemLT3D, a Semantic-Guided Expert Distillation framework designed to enrich the representation space for underrepresented classes through semantic priors. SemLT3D consists of: (1) a language-guided mixture-of-experts module that routes 3D queries to specialized experts according to their semantic affinity, enabling the model to better disentangle confusing classes and specialize on tail distributions; and (2) a semantic projection distillation pipeline that aligns 3D queries with CLIP-informed 2D semantics, producing more coherent and discriminative features across diverse visual manifestations. Although motivated by long-tail imbalance, the semantically structured learning in SemLT3D also improves robustness under broader appearance variations and challenging corner cases, offering a principled step toward more reliable camera-only 3D perception.

</details>


### [268] [S2H-DPO: Hardness-Aware Preference Optimization for Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18512)
*Nitish Shukla,Surgan Jandial,Arun Ross*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个简单到困难（S2H）学习框架，通过构建三个层次的多图像偏好数据来增强视觉语言模型的多图像推理能力，包括单图像局部推理、多图像局部比较和全局视觉搜索，显著提升了多图像理解性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在单图像理解方面表现优异，但在多图像推理方面存在能力差距。当前方法主要依赖预定义图像索引进行局部推理，缺乏全局视觉搜索和自主跨图像比较的能力。

Method: 提出了一个简单到困难（S2H）学习框架，系统性地构建三个层次的多图像偏好数据：1）单图像局部推理；2）多图像局部比较；3）全局视觉搜索。该方法利用提示驱动的复杂性创建适用于不同模型的偏好对，而不是依赖模型特定属性。

Result: 在LLaVA和Qwen-VL模型上的广泛评估表明，该方法显著提升了多图像推理性能，在多个基准测试中明显优于基线方法。同时保持了强大的单图像推理能力。

Conclusion: 该方法通过系统性的多图像偏好数据构建，有效增强了视觉语言模型的多图像理解能力，推动了整体视觉偏好对齐的先进水平，同时不损害单图像推理性能。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable progress in single-image understanding, yet effective reasoning across multiple images remains challenging. We identify a critical capability gap in existing multi-image alignment approaches: current methods focus primarily on localized reasoning with pre-specified image indices (``Look at Image 3 and...''), bypassing the essential skills of global visual search and autonomous cross-image comparison. To address this limitation, we introduce a Simple-to-Hard (S2H) learning framework that systematically constructs multi-image preference data across three hierarchical reasoning levels requiring an increasing level of capabilities: (1) single-image localized reasoning, (2) multi-image localized comparison, and (3) global visual search. Unlike prior work that relies on model-specific attributes, such as hallucinations or attention heuristics, to generate preference pairs, our approach leverages prompt-driven complexity to create chosen/rejected pairs that are applicable across different models. Through extensive evaluations on LLaVA and Qwen-VL models, we show that our diverse multi-image reasoning data significantly enhances multi-image reasoning performance, yielding significant improvements over baseline methods across benchmarks. Importantly, our approach maintains strong single-image reasoning performance while simultaneously strengthening multi-image understanding capabilities, thus advancing the state of the art for holistic visual preference alignment.

</details>


### [269] [MetaCloak-JPEG: JPEG-Robust Adversarial Perturbation for Preventing Unauthorized DreamBooth-Based Deepfake Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18537)
*Tanjim Rahaman Fardin,S M Zunaid Alam,Mahadi Hasan Fahim,Md Faysal Mahfuz*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MetaCloak-JPEG通过引入可微分JPEG层解决现有对抗性人脸保护系统在JPEG压缩下的失效问题，显著提升了保护信号的生存率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DreamBooth等技术使得仅需4-8张公开人脸图像即可生成逼真的深度伪造内容，而现有对抗性保护系统（PhotoGuard、Anti-DreamBooth、MetaCloak）都存在结构性盲点：未考虑社交平台普遍应用的JPEG压缩。由于JPEG量化使用的round()函数导数几乎处处为零，对抗性能量集中在高频DCT频带，而JPEG会丢弃这些频带，导致60-80%的保护信号失效。

Method: 提出MetaCloak-JPEG方法：1）插入基于直通估计器（STE）的可微分JPEG（DiffJPEG）层，前向传播应用标准JPEG压缩，反向传播用恒等函数替换round()；2）将DiffJPEG嵌入JPEG感知的EOT分布（约70%的数据增强包含DiffJPEG）；3）在双层元学习循环中使用课程质量因子调度（QF从95到50）。

Result: 在l-inf扰动预算eps=8/255下，MetaCloak-JPEG达到32.7 dB PSNR，JPEG生存率91.3%，在所有9个评估的JPEG质量因子上均优于PhotoGuard（9/9获胜，平均去噪损失增益+0.125），训练内存预算为4.1 GB。

Conclusion: MetaCloak-JPEG通过解决JPEG压缩导致的对抗性信号丢失问题，显著提升了对抗性人脸保护系统的实际有效性，为社交平台上的深度伪造防御提供了更可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: The rapid progress of subject-driven text-to-image synthesis, and in particular DreamBooth, has enabled a consent-free deepfake pipeline: an adversary needs only 4-8 publicly available face images to fine-tune a personalized diffusion model and produce photorealistic harmful content. Current adversarial face-protection systems -- PhotoGuard, Anti-DreamBooth, and MetaCloak -- perturb user images to disrupt surrogate fine-tuning, but all share a structural blindness: none backpropagates gradients through the JPEG compression pipeline that every major social-media platform applies before adversary access. Because JPEG quantization relies on round(), whose derivative is zero almost everywhere, adversarial energy concentrates in high-frequency DCT bands that JPEG discards, eliminating 60-80% of the protective signal. We introduce MetaCloak-JPEG, which closes this gap by inserting a Differentiable JPEG (DiffJPEG) layer built on the Straight-Through Estimator (STE): the forward pass applies standard JPEG compression, while the backward pass replaces round() with the identity. DiffJPEG is embedded in a JPEG-aware EOT distribution (~70% of augmentations include DiffJPEG) and a curriculum quality-factor schedule (QF: 95 to 50) inside a bilevel meta-learning loop. Under an l-inf perturbation budget of eps=8/255, MetaCloak-JPEG attains 32.7 dB PSNR, a 91.3% JPEG survival rate, and outperforms PhotoGuard on all 9 evaluated JPEG quality factors (9/9 wins, mean denoising-loss gain +0.125) within a 4.1 GB training-memory budget.

</details>


### [270] [Advancing Vision Transformer with Enhanced Spatial Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18549)
*Qihang Fan,Huaibo Huang,Mingrui Chen,Hongmin Liu,Ran He*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: EVT是RMT的改进版本，通过使用欧氏距离衰减代替曼哈顿距离来增强空间信息建模，并采用空间独立分组机制替代分解注意力，从而提升Vision Transformer的性能和灵活性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Vision Transformer (ViT) 的自注意力机制缺乏明确的空间先验，且具有平方计算复杂度，限制了其应用范围。RMT虽然通过曼哈顿距离衰减引入了空间信息，但仍存在改进空间。

Method: 1. 使用欧氏距离衰减替代曼哈顿距离衰减，更准确地建模空间关系；2. 放弃RMT的分解注意力机制，采用空间独立分组方法，提供更灵活的token分组控制。

Result: EVT在ImageNet-1k上达到86.6%的top-1准确率（无额外训练数据）。在图像分类、目标检测、实例分割和语义分割等任务上均表现出色。

Conclusion: EVT通过改进的空间先验建模和更灵活的分组机制，有效克服了RMT的局限性，为Vision Transformer提供了更强大和通用的视觉骨干网络。

Abstract: In recent years, the Vision Transformer (ViT) has garnered significant attention within the computer vision community. However, the core component of ViT, Self-Attention, lacks explicit spatial priors and suffers from quadratic computational complexity, limiting its applicability. To address these issues, we have proposed RMT, a robust vision backbone with explicit spatial priors for general purposes. RMT utilizes Manhattan distance decay to introduce spatial information and employs a horizontal and vertical decomposition attention method to model global information. Building on the strengths of RMT, Euclidean enhanced Vision Transformer (EVT) is an expanded version that incorporates several key improvements. Firstly, EVT uses a more reasonable Euclidean distance decay to enhance the modeling of spatial information, allowing for a more accurate representation of spatial relationships compared to the Manhattan distance used in RMT. Secondly, EVT abandons the decomposed attention mechanism featured in RMT and instead adopts a simpler spatially-independent grouping approach, providing the model with greater flexibility in controlling the number of tokens within each group. By addressing these modifications, EVT offers a more sophisticated and adaptable approach to incorporating spatial priors into the Self-Attention mechanism, thus overcoming some of the limitations associated with RMT and further enhancing its applicability in various computer vision tasks. Extensive experiments on Image Classification, Object Detection, Instance Segmentation, and Semantic Segmentation demonstrate that EVT exhibits exceptional performance. Without additional training data, EVT achieves 86.6% top1-acc on ImageNet-1k.

</details>


### [271] [SynAgent: Generalizable Cooperative Humanoid Manipulation via Solo-to-Cooperative Agent Synergy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18557)
*Wei Yao,Haohan Ma,Hongwen Zhang,Yunlian Sun,Liangjun Xing,Zhile Yang,Yuanjun Guo,Yebin Liu,Jinhui Tang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SynAgent是一个基于Solo-to-Cooperative Agent Synergy的框架，通过将单智能体人-物交互技能迁移到多智能体人-物-人协作场景，实现可扩展、物理合理的协作操作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决可控制的人形机器人协作操作问题，该问题面临数据稀缺、多智能体协调复杂、跨对象泛化能力有限等挑战。

Method: 1. 基于Delaunay四面体化的交互网格进行交互保持重定向，保持语义完整性；2. 单智能体预训练与适应范式，通过去中心化训练和多智能体PPO从丰富的单人数据中引导协同行为；3. 基于条件VAE的轨迹条件生成策略，通过多教师蒸馏实现稳定可控的对象级轨迹执行。

Result: SynAgent在协作模仿和轨迹条件控制方面显著优于现有基线方法，并能泛化到不同的物体几何形状。

Conclusion: 该框架通过将单智能体技能迁移到多智能体协作场景，实现了可扩展、物理合理的协作操作，为解决数据稀缺的协作操作问题提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Controllable cooperative humanoid manipulation is a fundamental yet challenging problem for embodied intelligence, due to severe data scarcity, complexities in multi-agent coordination, and limited generalization across objects. In this paper, we present SynAgent, a unified framework that enables scalable and physically plausible cooperative manipulation by leveraging Solo-to-Cooperative Agent Synergy to transfer skills from single-agent human-object interaction to multi-agent human-object-human scenarios. To maintain semantic integrity during motion transfer, we introduce an interaction-preserving retargeting method based on an Interact Mesh constructed via Delaunay tetrahedralization, which faithfully maintains spatial relationships among humans and objects. Building upon this refined data, we propose a single-agent pretraining and adaptation paradigm that bootstraps synergistic collaborative behaviors from abundant single-human data through decentralized training and multi-agent PPO. Finally, we develop a trajectory-conditioned generative policy using a conditional VAE, trained via multi-teacher distillation from motion imitation priors to achieve stable and controllable object-level trajectory execution. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SynAgent significantly outperforms existing baselines in both cooperative imitation and trajectory-conditioned control, while generalizing across diverse object geometries. Codes and data will be available after publication. Project Page: http://yw0208.github.io/synagent

</details>


### [272] [AnchorSeg: Language Grounded Query Banks for Reasoning Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18562)
*Rui Qian,Chuanhang Deng,Qiang Huang,Jian Xiong,Mingxuan Li,Yingbo Zhou,Wei Zhai,Jintao Chen,Dejing Dou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AnchorSeg提出了一种新的推理分割方法，通过结构化查询银行显式解耦语义推理和空间定位，使用Token-Mask Cycle Consistency训练目标，在ReasonSeg数据集上取得SOTA结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖单个分割token来编码语义推理和空间定位，这限制了模型显式解耦"分割什么"和"在哪里分割"的能力。需要一种能够显式分离这两个任务的方法。

Method: AnchorSeg将推理分割重新定义为基于语言锚定查询银行的结构化条件生成过程。构建有序的查询银行序列：潜在推理token捕获中间语义状态，分割锚点token提供显式空间定位。将空间条件建模为图像token上的分解分布，锚点查询确定定位信号，上下文查询提供语义调制。提出Token-Mask Cycle Consistency双向训练目标来桥接token级预测和像素级监督。

Result: 在ReasonSeg测试集上取得67.7% gIoU和68.1% cIoU的state-of-the-art结果。

Conclusion: 通过结构化语言锚定查询银行显式解耦空间定位和语义推理，AnchorSeg能够更好地处理复杂的推理分割任务，并在基准测试中表现出色。所有代码和模型都已公开。

Abstract: Reasoning segmentation requires models to ground complex, implicit textual queries into precise pixel-level masks. Existing approaches rely on a single segmentation token $\texttt{<SEG>}$, whose hidden state implicitly encodes both semantic reasoning and spatial localization, limiting the model's ability to explicitly disentangle what to segment from where to segment. We introduce AnchorSeg, which reformulates reasoning segmentation as a structured conditional generation process over image tokens, conditioned on language grounded query banks. Instead of compressing all semantic reasoning and spatial localization into a single embedding, AnchorSeg constructs an ordered sequence of query banks: latent reasoning tokens that capture intermediate semantic states, and a segmentation anchor token that provides explicit spatial grounding. We model spatial conditioning as a factorized distribution over image tokens, where the anchor query determines localization signals while contextual queries provide semantic modulation. To bridge token-level predictions and pixel-level supervision, we propose Token--Mask Cycle Consistency (TMCC), a bidirectional training objective that enforces alignment across resolutions. By explicitly decoupling spatial grounding from semantic reasoning through structured language grounded query banks, AnchorSeg achieves state-of-the-art results on ReasonSeg test set (67.7\% gIoU and 68.1\% cIoU). All code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/rui-qian/AnchorSeg.

</details>


### [273] [MultiWorld: Scalable Multi-Agent Multi-View Video World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18564)
*Haoyu Wu,Jiwen Yu,Yingtian Zou,Xihui Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MultiWorld：一个用于多智能体多视角世界建模的统一框架，通过引入多智能体条件模块和全局状态编码器，实现了对多个智能体的精确控制和多视角一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频世界模型主要局限于单智能体场景，无法捕捉真实世界多智能体系统中复杂的交互关系，因此需要开发能够处理多智能体多视角环境的世界模型。

Method: 提出MultiWorld框架，包含：1）多智能体条件模块实现精确的多智能体可控性；2）全局状态编码器确保不同视角间的观测一致性；3）支持智能体和视角数量的灵活扩展，并行合成不同视角以提高效率。

Result: 在多玩家游戏环境和多机器人操作任务上的实验表明，MultiWorld在视频保真度、动作跟随能力和多视角一致性方面均优于基线方法。

Conclusion: MultiWorld为多智能体多视角世界建模提供了一个有效的统一框架，能够准确控制多个智能体并保持多视角一致性，具有灵活的可扩展性和高效率。

Abstract: Video world models have achieved remarkable success in simulating environmental dynamics in response to actions by users or agents. They are modeled as action-conditioned video generation models that take historical frames and current actions as input to predict future frames. Yet, most existing approaches are limited to single-agent scenarios and fail to capture the complex interactions inherent in real-world multi-agent systems. We present \textbf{MultiWorld}, a unified framework for multi-agent multi-view world modeling that enables accurate control of multiple agents while maintaining multi-view consistency. We introduce the Multi-Agent Condition Module to achieve precise multi-agent controllability, and the Global State Encoder to ensure coherent observations across different views. MultiWorld supports flexible scaling of agent and view counts, and synthesizes different views in parallel for high efficiency. Experiments on multi-player game environments and multi-robot manipulation tasks demonstrate that MultiWorld outperforms baselines in video fidelity, action-following ability, and multi-view consistency. Project page: https://multi-world.github.io/

</details>


### [274] [T-REN: Learning Text-Aligned Region Tokens Improves Dense Vision-Language Alignment and Scalability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18573)
*Savya Khosla,Sethuraman T,Aryan Chadha,Alex Schwing,Derek Hoiem*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: T-REN是一个高效的文本对齐区域编码器网络，通过轻量级网络将视觉数据映射为紧凑的文本对齐区域级表示，显著提升跨模态理解能力并大幅减少token数量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言编码器存在两个核心限制：1) 语言与密集视觉特征对齐较弱，影响开放词汇语义分割等任务；2) 细粒度视觉表示需要大量token，限制了在长视频上的可扩展性。

Method: 在冻结的视觉骨干网络之上添加轻量级网络，将每个语义区域内的patch级表示池化为区域token，并与区域级文本注释对齐，仅增加3.7%的参数。

Result: 在多个任务上取得显著提升：ADE20K开放词汇分割+5.9 mIoU，COCO目标级图文检索+18.4%召回率，Ego4D视频目标定位+15.6%召回率，VSPW视频场景解析+17.6% mIoU，同时将token数量减少24倍（图像）和187倍（视频）。

Conclusion: T-REN通过紧凑的文本对齐区域级表示，同时解决了视觉语言对齐不足和token数量过多的问题，在保持高效率的同时显著提升了跨模态理解能力。

Abstract: Despite recent progress, vision-language encoders struggle with two core limitations: (1) weak alignment between language and dense vision features, which hurts tasks like open-vocabulary semantic segmentation; and (2) high token counts for fine-grained visual representations, which limits scalability to long videos. This work addresses both limitations. We propose T-REN (Text-aligned Region Encoder Network), an efficient encoder that maps visual data to a compact set of text-aligned region-level representations (or region tokens). T-REN achieves this through a lightweight network added on top of a frozen vision backbone, trained to pool patch-level representations within each semantic region into region tokens and align them with region-level text annotations. With only 3.7% additional parameters compared to the vision-language backbone, this design yields substantially stronger dense cross-modal understanding while reducing the token count by orders of magnitude. Specifically, T-REN delivers +5.9 mIoU on ADE20K open-vocabulary segmentation, +18.4% recall on COCO object-level text-image retrieval, +15.6% recall on Ego4D video object localization, and +17.6% mIoU on VSPW video scene parsing, all while reducing token counts by more than 24x for images and 187x for videos compared to the patch-based vision-language backbone. The code and model are available at https://github.com/savya08/T-REN.

</details>


### [275] [ReCap: Lightweight Referential Grounding for Coherent Story Visualization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18575)
*Aditya Arora,Akshita Gupta,Pau Rodriguez,Marcus Rohrbach*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ReCap是一个轻量级的故事可视化一致性框架，通过条件帧引用和语义漂移校正技术，在保持角色身份一致性和视觉保真度的同时，仅增加14.9万参数，显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统故事可视化方法依赖显式记忆库、架构扩展或辅助语言模型来保持跨帧一致性，导致参数大量增加和推理开销过大。需要一种轻量级方法在不修改基础扩散模型的情况下提高角色稳定性和视觉保真度。

Method: ReCap采用两个关键技术：1) CORE模块，将代词作为视觉锚点，仅在角色被代词引用时激活，并以前一帧为条件传播视觉身份；2) SemDrift，在训练期间对齐去噪器表示与预训练DINOv3视觉嵌入，校正语义漂移。整个框架仅增加14.9万参数。

Result: 在FlintstonesSV基准上字符准确率提升2.63%，在PororoSV基准上提升5.65%，在两个主要故事可视化基准上都达到了新的最优结果。还能扩展到真实电影衍生的人类中心叙事。

Conclusion: ReCap通过选择性条件帧引用和语义漂移校正，以极小的参数代价实现了优秀的故事可视化一致性，超越了依赖记忆库和LLM增强的方法，并展示了从卡通领域到真实人类叙事的扩展能力。

Abstract: Story Visualization aims to generate a sequence of images that faithfully depicts a textual narrative that preserve character identity, spatial configuration, and stylistic coherence as the narratives unfold. Maintaining such cross-frame consistency has traditionally relied on explicit memory banks, architectural expansion, or auxiliary language models, resulting in substantial parameter growth and inference overhead. We introduce ReCap, a lightweight consistency framework that improves character stability and visual fidelity without modifying the base diffusion backbone. ReCap's CORE (COnditional frame REferencing) module treats anaphors, in our case pronouns, as visual anchors, activating only when characters are referred to by a pronoun and conditioning on the preceding frame to propagate visual identity. This selective design avoids unconditional cross-frame conditioning and introduces only 149K additional parameters, a fraction of the cost of memory-bank and LLM-augmented approaches. To further stabilize identity, we incorporate SemDrift (Guided Semantic Drift Correction) applied only during training. When text is vague or referential, the denoiser lacks a visual anchor for identity-defining attributes, causing character appearance to drift across frames, SemDrift corrects this by aligning denoiser representations with pretrained DINOv3 visual embeddings, enforcing semantic identity stability at zero inference cost. ReCap outperforms previous state-of-the-art, StoryGPT-V, on the two main benchmarks for story visualization by 2.63% Character-Accuracy on FlintstonesSV and by 5.65% on PororoSV, establishing a new state-of-the-art character consistency on both benchmarks. Furthermore, we extend story visualization to human-centric narratives derived from real films, demonstrating the capability of ReCap beyond stylized cartoon domains.

</details>


### [276] [MUA: Mobile Ultra-detailed Animatable Avatars](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18583)
*Heming Zhu,Guoxing Sun,Marc Habermann*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Wavelet-guided Multi-level Spatial Factorized Blendshapes表示法和蒸馏管道，在保持高质量动态和外观细节的同时，大幅降低计算成本和模型大小


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可动画化数字人建模方法存在两极分化：要么需要服务器级GPU的高计算成本实现超高保真度，要么为移动设备优化但牺牲动态细节和外观质量。需要同时实现高质量和高效能

Method: 提出小波引导的多层次空间分解混合形状表示法，通过多级小波频谱分解与纹理空间低秩结构分解相结合，从预训练的高质量教师模型蒸馏运动感知的衣物动态和细粒度外观细节

Result: 相比原始高质量教师模型，计算成本降低2000倍，模型大小减少10倍，在桌面PC上达到180+ FPS，在Meta Quest 3上实现24 FPS的实时设备端性能，渲染质量优于现有移动端方法，与服务器端方法相当或更好

Conclusion: 该方法成功填补了高质量与高效能数字人建模之间的空白，显著提升了高保真度虚拟人在沉浸式应用中的实用性

Abstract: Building photorealistic, animatable full-body digital humans remains a longstanding challenge in computer graphics and vision. Recent advances in animatable avatar modeling have largely progressed along two directions: improving the fidelity of dynamic geometry and appearance, or reducing computational complexity to enable deployment on resource-constrained platforms, e.g., VR headsets. However, existing approaches fail to achieve both goals simultaneously: Ultra-high-fidelity avatars typically require substantial computation on server-class GPUs, whereas lightweight avatars often suffer from limited surface dynamics, reduced appearance details, and noticeable artifacts. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel animatable avatar representation, termed Wavelet-guided Multi-level Spatial Factorized Blendshapes, and a corresponding distillation pipeline that transfers motion-aware clothing dynamics and fine-grained appearance details from a pre-trained ultra-high-quality avatar model into a compact, efficient representation. By coupling multi-level wavelet spectral decomposition with low-rank structural factorization in texture space, our method achieves up to 2000X lower computational cost and a 10X smaller model size than the original high-quality teacher avatar model, while preserving visually plausible dynamics and appearance details closely resemble those of the teacher model. Extensive comparisons with state-of-the-art methods show that our approach significantly outperforms existing avatar approaches designed for mobile settings and achieves comparable or superior rendering quality to most approaches that can only run on servers. Importantly, our representation substantially improves the practicality of high-fidelity avatars for immersive applications, achieving over 180 FPS on a desktop PC and real-time native on-device performance at 24 FPS on a standalone Meta Quest 3.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [277] [BrainMem: Brain-Inspired Evolving Memory for Embodied Agent Task Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16331)
*Xiaoyu Ma,Lianyu Hu,Wenbing Tang,Zixuan Hu,Zeqin Liao,Zhizhen Wu,Yang Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: BrainMem：一种受人类认知启发的免训练分层记忆系统，为具身智能体提供工作记忆、情景记忆和语义记忆，显著提升长时程复杂任务的执行成功率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的具身任务规划器大多是"无状态"和"反应式"的，缺乏持久记忆，导致重复错误且难以处理空间或时间依赖性任务

Method: 提出BrainMem分层记忆系统，包含工作记忆、情景记忆和语义记忆，将交互历史转化为结构化知识图谱和符号化指导原则，无需模型微调或额外训练

Result: 在EB-ALFRED、EB-Navigation、EB-Manipulation和EB-Habitat四个基准测试中，BrainMem显著提升了各种模型的任务成功率，特别是在长时程和空间复杂任务上效果最明显

Conclusion: 演化记忆机制是实现可扩展、通用化具身智能的有前景方法，BrainMem的即插即用设计能无缝集成各种多模态LLM，减少对特定任务提示工程的依赖

Abstract: Embodied task planning requires agents to execute long-horizon, goal-directed actions in complex 3D environments, where success depends on both immediate perception and accumulated experience across tasks. However, most existing LLM-based planners are stateless and reactive, operating without persistent memory and therefore repeating errors and struggling with spatial or temporal dependencies. We propose BrainMem(Brain-Inspired Evolving Memory), a training-free hierarchical memory system that equips embodied agents with working, episodic, and semantic memory inspired by human cognition. BrainMem continuously transforms interaction histories into structured knowledge graphs and distilled symbolic guidelines, enabling planners to retrieve, reason over, and adapt behaviors from past experience without any model fine-tuning or additional training. This plug-and-play design integrates seamlessly with arbitrary multi-modal LLMs and greatly reduces reliance on task-specific prompt engineering. Extensive experiments on four representative benchmarks, including EB-ALFRED, EB-Navigation, EB-Manipulation, and EB-Habitat, demonstrate that BrainMem significantly enhances task success rates across diverse models and difficulty subsets, with the largest gains observed on long-horizon and spatially complex tasks. These results highlight evolving memory as a promising and scalable mechanism for generalizable embodied intelligence.

</details>


### [278] [Interdisciplinary Workshop on Mechanical Intelligence: Summary Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16381)
*Victoria A. Webster-Wood,Nicholas Gravish,Amir Alavi,Andres F Arrieta,Sarah Bergbreiter,Anthony Bloch,Laura Blumenschein,C. Chase Cao,Aja Mia Carter,Paolo Celli,Tony Chen,Margaret Coad,Mark Cutkosky,Michael Dickey,Brian Do,Robert Full,Mahdi Haghshenas-Jaryani,Kaushik Jayaram,Aaron Johnson,Eva Kanso,Emma Lejeune,Chen Li,Suyi Li,Jeffrey Lipton,Rob MacCurdy,Matt McHenry,Jean-Michel Mongeau,Todd Murphey,Mark Plecnik,Jordan Raney,Ryan D. Sochol,Hannah Stuart,Zeynep Temel,Michael Tolley,Barry Trimmer,T. J. Wallin,Kon-Well Wang,Wenzhong Yan,Mark Yim,Wenlong Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 2024机械智能跨学科研讨会总结报告，探讨了通过材料/生物/机器人系统结构特征实现智能的新范式，与计算智能形成对比。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索机械智能这一新兴领域，研究如何通过材料、生物和机器人系统的结构特征实现响应性、适应性、记忆和学习等智能功能，区别于传统的计算智能。

Method: 举办为期两天的跨学科研讨会，邀请38位学术研究人员和8位NSF项目官员参与，通过小组讨论（4-5人）和大组讨论（9-10人）形式，围绕机械智能主题问题进行深入探讨。

Result: 研讨会通过分组讨论和共享演示文稿记录成果，最后一天进行最终展示，形成了关于机械智能发展的集体见解和建议。

Conclusion: 机械智能作为一个新兴研究领域，通过结构本身实现智能功能，具有重要研究价值和广阔应用前景，需要跨学科合作推动发展。

Abstract: This report provides a summary of the outcomes of the Interdisciplinary Workshop on Mechanical Intelligence held in 2024. Mechanical Intelligence (MI) represents the phenomenon that novel structural features of material/biological/robotic systems can encode intelligence through responsiveness, adaptivity, memory, and learning in the mechanical structure itself. This is in contrast to computational intelligence, wherein the intelligence functions occur through electrical signaling and computer code. The two-day workshop was held at NSF headquarters on May 30-31 and included 38 invited academic researcher participants, and 8 program officers from the NSF. The workshop was structured around active small and large group discussions in groups of 4-5 and 9-10 with the goal of addressing topical questions on MI. Working groups entered notes into shared presentation slides for each discussion session and presented their outcomes in a final presentation on the last day. Here we summarize the overall outcomes of the workshop.

</details>


### [279] [RHINO-AR: An Augmented Reality Exhibit for Teaching Mobile Robotics Concepts in Museums](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16384)
*Nils Dengler,Tim Graf,Leif Van Holland,Patrick Stotko,Reinhard Klein,Maren Bennewitz*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RHINO-AR是一个增强现实博物馆展览系统，通过AR技术在真实博物馆空间中重现历史移动机器人RHINO，让游客与真实展览环境互动，解决VR系统的现实差距问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 之前开发的RHINO-VR虚拟现实系统虽然能提供沉浸式体验，但游客与真实展览空间和实体机器人分离，存在现实差距。RHINO-AR旨在通过增强现实技术将虚拟机器人直接放置在真实博物馆环境中，解决这一问题。

Method: 在Magic Leap 2头显上使用Unity实现，结合实时环境网格化与交互式可视化（包括LiDAR感知、可通行性分析和路径规划），使不可见的机器人过程对非专业游客可理解。

Result: 通过为期两天的博物馆研究（22名参与者）评估显示，RHINO-AR在可用性、技术性能、满意度、概念理解和与VR版本对比方面表现良好，能有效传达关键导航概念，并因其更强的物理基础性和更高真实感而普遍更受青睐。

Conclusion: RHINO-AR成功解决了VR系统的现实差距问题，通过增强现实技术将历史机器人重新引入原始展览环境，为非专业游客提供了更真实、更有效的机器人技术教育体验，展现了AR在博物馆展览中的优势。

Abstract: We present RHINO-AR, an interactive Augmented Reality (AR) museum exhibit that reintroduces the historical mobile robot RHINO into its original exhibition environment at the Deutsches Museum Bonn. The system builds on our previous work RHINO-VR, which reconstructed the robot and the environment in virtual reality. Although this created an engaging experience, it also revealed an important limitation, because visitors were separated from the real exhibition space and from the physical robot on display. RHINO-AR addresses this reality gap by placing a virtual reconstruction of the robot directly into the real museum space. Implemented on a Magic Leap~2 headset using Unity, our system combines real-time environment meshing with interactive visualizations of LiDAR sensing, traversability, and path planning to make otherwise invisible robotics processes understandable to non-expert visitors. We evaluated RHINO-AR in a two-day museum study with 22 participants, assessing usability, technical performance, satisfaction, conceptual understanding, and preference comparison to RHINO-VR. The results show that RHINO-AR was well received, effectively conveyed key navigation concepts, and generally preferred over the VR exhibit due to its stronger physical grounding and increased realism.

</details>


### [280] [Visual-RRT: Finding Paths toward Visual-Goals via Differentiable Rendering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16388)
*Sebin Lee,Jumin Lee,Taeyeon Kim,Younju Na,Woobin Im,Sung-Eui Yoon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: vRRT是一种结合可微分机器人渲染梯度优化与RRT采样探索的运动规划器，能够通过视觉观察（如图像或演示视频）而非精确关节角度来规划机器人运动


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RRT规划器需要精确的关节角度作为目标配置，但实际应用中常通过图像或视频等视觉观察来指定目标，这些情况下精确目标配置不可用，存在视觉目标规划的需求

Method: 提出视觉RRT（vRRT），结合可微分机器人渲染的梯度优化与RRT的采样探索；引入前沿探索-利用策略自适应优先处理视觉有前景的搜索区域；采用惯性梯度树扩展在树分支间继承优化状态以实现动量一致的梯度利用

Result: 在Franka、UR5e和Fetch等多种机器人机械臂上的实验表明，vRRT在仿真和真实环境中都能有效实现视觉目标规划，弥合了基于采样的规划与以视觉为中心的机器人应用之间的差距

Conclusion: vRRT通过统一梯度优化与采样探索，成功实现了基于视觉观察的运动规划，为视觉驱动的机器人应用提供了有效的解决方案

Abstract: Rapidly-exploring random trees (RRTs) have been widely adopted for robot motion planning due to their robustness and theoretical guarantees. However, existing RRT-based planners require explicit goal configurations specified as numerical joint angles, while many practical applications provide goal specifications through visual observations such as images or demonstration videos where precise goal configurations are unavailable. In this paper, we propose visual-RRT (vRRT), a motion planner that enables visual-goal planning by unifying gradient-based exploitation from differentiable robot rendering with sampling-based exploration from RRTs. We further introduce (i) a frontier-based exploration-exploitation strategy that adaptively prioritizes visually promising search regions, and (ii) inertial gradient tree expansion that inherits optimization states across tree branches for momentum-consistent gradient exploitation. Extensive experiments across various robot manipulators including Franka, UR5e, and Fetch demonstrate that vRRT achieves effective visual-goal planning in both simulated and real-world settings, bridging the gap between sampling-based planning and vision-centric robot applications. Our code is available at https://sgvr.kaist.ac.kr/Visual-RRT.

</details>


### [281] [Disentangled Robot Learning via Separate Forward and Inverse Dynamics Pretraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16391)
*Wenyao Zhang,Bozhou Zhang,Zekun Qi,Wenjun Zeng,Xin Jin,Li Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DeFI框架通过解耦视觉前向和逆向动力学预训练，分别利用不同的数据源，解决了VLA模型中2D图像预测和3D动作预测之间的错位问题，显著提升了机器人任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA模型面临两个主要问题：1) 2D图像预测与3D动作预测之间的不对齐问题；2) 视觉-动作耦合的训练方式限制了模型从大规模无动作的网页视频数据中学习的能力。

Method: 提出DeFI框架，解耦视觉前向动力学模型（GFDM）和逆向动力学模型（GIDM）。GFDM在多样化的人体和机器人视频上进行未来预测预训练，GIDM通过自监督学习从无标签视频转换中推断潜在动作。然后将两个模型集成到统一架构中进行下游任务的端到端微调。

Result: 在CALVIN ABC-D上平均任务长度达到4.51，在SimplerEnv-Fractal基准测试上成功率51.2%，在真实世界部署中成功率81.3%，显著优于先前方法。

Conclusion: DeFI框架通过解耦前向和逆向动力学预训练，有效解决了VLA模型的错位问题，使模型能够充分利用不同类型的数据源，最终在多个基准测试和真实场景中取得了最先进的性能。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have shown great potential in building generalist robots, but still face a dilemma-misalignment of 2D image forecasting and 3D action prediction. Besides, such a vision-action entangled training manner limits model learning from large-scale, action-free web video data. To address these issues, we propose DeFI, a novel framework that Decouples visual Forward and Inverse dynamics pretraining to exploit respective data sources, wherein video generation and action prediction are disentangled. We introduce the General Forward Dynamics Model (GFDM), pretrained on diverse human and robot videos for future prediction, and the General Inverse Dynamics Model (GIDM), trained via self-supervised learning to infer latent actions from unlabeled video transitions. These models are then integrated into a unified architecture for end-to-end finetuning on downstream tasks. In this manner, GFDM and GIDM first shine separately and then cooperate for mutual benefit. Extensive experiments on CALVIN ABC-D and SimplerEnv demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, with DeFI achieving an average task length of 4.51 for CALVIN, 51.2% success rate on SimplerEnv-Fractal benchmark and 81.3% success rate in real-world deployment, significantly outperforming prior methods.

</details>


### [282] [ICAT: Incident-Case-Grounded Adaptive Testing for Physical-Risk Prediction in Embodied World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16405)
*Zhenglin Lai,Sirui Huang,Yuteng Li,Changxin Huang,Jianqiang Li,Bingzhe Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ICAT方法通过构建结构化风险记忆来约束视频生成世界模型，提升其对危险场景的预测能力，但现有主流模型在安全关键场景中仍存在可靠性不足的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视频生成世界模型在预测物理风险和严重后果方面存在不足，常常淡化或忽略危险动作的关键警示信号和严重后果，这可能导致在规划和训练中产生不安全偏好。

Method: 提出ICAT方法，基于真实事故报告和安全手册构建结构化风险记忆，通过检索和组合这些记忆来约束风险案例的生成，包括因果链和严重程度标签。

Result: 在基于ICAT的基准测试中，主流世界模型经常错过危险机制和触发条件，且严重程度校准不准确，无法满足安全关键部署所需的可靠性。

Conclusion: 视频生成世界模型在安全关键场景中的可靠性仍需提升，ICAT为评估和改进这些模型的安全预测能力提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Video-generative world models are increasingly used as neural simulators for embodied planning and policy learning, yet their ability to predict physical risk and severe consequences is rarely evaluated.We find that these models often downplay or omit key danger cues and severe outcomes for hazardous actions, which can induce unsafe preferences during planning and training on imagined rollouts. We propose ICAT, which grounds testing in real incident reports and safety manuals by building structured risk memories and retrieving/composing them to constrain the generation of risk cases with causal chains and severity labels. Experiments on an ICAT-based benchmark show that mainstream world models frequently miss mechanisms and triggering conditions and miscalibrate severity, falling short of the reliability required for safety-critical embodied deployment.

</details>


### [283] [An Edge-Host-Cloud Architecture for Robot-Agnostic, Caregiver-in-the-Loop Personalized Cognitive Exercise: Multi-Site Deployment in Dementia Care](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16408)
*Wenzheng Zhao,Ruth Palan Lopez,Shu Fen Wung,Fengpei Yuan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Speaking Memories是一个分布式、利益相关者参与的机器人交互平台，用于个性化认知锻炼支持，通过边缘智能、多模态感知和云知识整合实现低延迟、隐私保护的个性化对话。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一个通用的机器人架构，将护理人员知识、边缘智能和机器人代理整合到统一的社会技术循环中，为认知锻炼提供个性化支持，同时解决隐私保护和可扩展部署的问题。

Method: 采用分布式架构，通过本地边缘交互服务器解耦多模态感知和推理与机器人硬件；护理人员通过安全云门户输入结构化传记知识；系统融合听觉、视觉和文本信号实现情感感知的个性化对话；包含自动多模态评估层分析用户响应和参与模式。

Result: 实现了低于6秒的响应延迟，稳健的多模态同步，参与者与护理人员反馈积极；支持大规模交互指标生成；数据集可在获得同意后分享。

Conclusion: Speaking Memories平台成功实现了低延迟、隐私保护的个性化机器人交互，支持跨异构机器人部署，为未来临床和护理人员驱动的个性化干预规划奠定了基础。

Abstract: We present Speaking Memories, a distributed, stakeholder-in-the-loop robotic interaction platform for personalized cognitive exercise support. Rather than a single robot-centric system, Speaking Memories is designed as a generalizable robotics architecture that integrates caregiver-authored knowledge, local edge intelligence, and embodied robotic agents into a unified socio-technical loop. The platform fuses auditory, visual, and textual signals to enable emotion-aware, personalized dialogue, while decoupling multimodal perception and reasoning from robot-specific hardware through a local edge interaction server. This design achieves low-latency, privacy-preserving operation and supports scalable deployment across heterogeneous robotic embodiments. Caregivers and family members contribute structured biographical knowledge via a secure cloud portal, which conditions downstream dialogue policies and enables longitudinal personalization across interaction sessions. Beyond real-time interaction, the system incorporates an automated multimodal evaluation layer that continuously analyzes user responses, affective cues, and engagement patterns, producing structured interaction metrics at scale. These metrics support systematic assessment of interaction quality, enable data-driven model fine-tuning, and lay the foundation for future clinician- and caregiver-informed personalization and intervention planning. We evaluate the platform through real-world deployments, measuring end-to-end latency, dialogue coherence, interaction stability, and stakeholder-reported usability and engagement. Results demonstrate sub-6-second response latency, robust multimodal synchronization, and consistently positive feedback from both participants and caregivers. Furthermore, subsets of the dataset can be shared upon request, subject to participant consent and IRB constraints.

</details>


### [284] [LatentMimic: Terrain-Adaptive Locomotion via Latent Space Imitation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16440)
*Zhiquan Wang,Yunyu Liu,Dipam Patel,Ayush Kumar,Aniket Bera,Bedrich Benes*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: LatentMimic是一个四足机器人运动学习框架，通过解耦风格保真度和几何约束，在保持运动风格的同时实现复杂地形自适应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于模仿的方法面临基本优化权衡：严格遵守动作捕捉参考会惩罚地形适应所需的几何偏差，而地形中心策略又常常损害风格保真度。需要一种既能保持运动风格又能适应复杂地形的方法。

Method: 1. 引入LatentMimic框架，通过最小化策略状态-动作分布与学习到的动作捕捉先验之间的边际潜在差异，解耦风格保真度和几何约束。2. 采用地形适应模块和动态回放缓冲区来解决不同地形间的分布偏移问题。

Result: 在四种运动风格和四种地形上验证，LatentMimic实现了有效的地形自适应运动，比最先进的运动跟踪方法获得更高的地形穿越成功率，同时保持高风格保真度。

Conclusion: LatentMimic通过解耦风格保真度和几何约束，成功解决了四足机器人运动控制中风格保持与地形适应之间的权衡问题，为自然多样的运动控制提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Developing natural and diverse locomotion controllers for quadruped robots that can adapt to complex terrains while preserving motion style remains a significant challenge. Existing imitation-based methods face a fundamental optimization trade-off: strict adherence to motion capture (mocap) references penalizes the geometric deviations required for terrain adaptability, whereas terrain-centric policies often compromise stylistic fidelity. We introduce LatentMimic, a novel locomotion learning framework that decouples stylistic fidelity from geometric constraints. By minimizing the marginal latent divergence between the policy's state-action distribution and a learned mocap prior, our approach provides a conditional relaxation of rigid pose-tracking objectives. This formulation preserves gait topology while permitting independent end-effector adaptations for irregular terrains. We further introduce a terrain adaptation module with a dynamic replay buffer to resolve the policy's distribution shifts across different terrains. We validate our method across four locomotion styles and four terrains, demonstrating that LatentMimic enables effective terrain-adaptive locomotion, achieving higher terrain traversal success rates than state-of-the-art motion-tracking methods while maintaining high stylistic fidelity.

</details>


### [285] [Compiling OpenSCENARIO 2.1 for Scenario-Based Testing in CARLA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16452)
*Thoshitha Gamage,Lasanthi Gamage*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出多阶段现代编译器架构，将OpenSCENARIO 2.1 DSL直接转换为可执行的CARLA行为树，实现声明式场景测试


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然OpenSCENARIO 2.1 DSL支持声明式意图驱动的场景测试编写，但在CARLA等开源模拟器中的集成受到传统解析器的限制，需要更直接的转换方法

Method: 采用三阶段编译器架构：ANTLR4前端生成AST，语义中间层，运行时后端合成确定性py_trees行为树。通过自定义方法注册表将标准化领域本体直接映射到CARLA的API，无需外部逻辑求解器

Result: 通过多参与者切入和规避机动演示场景验证了编译器能够处理并发动作、动态数学表达式和异步信号，建立了可复现、大规模场景测试的功能基线

Conclusion: 该框架为可复现的大规模场景测试奠定了基础，为未来C++优化以减轻当前Python计算开销铺平了道路

Abstract: While the ASAM OpenSCENARIO 2.1 Domain-Specific Language (DSL) enables declarative, intent-driven authoring for Scenario-Based Testing (SBT), its integration into open-source simulators like CARLA remains limited by legacy parsers. We propose a multi-pass modern compiler architecture that translates the OpenSCENARIO 2.1 DSL directly into executable CARLA behaviors. The pipeline features an ANTLR4 frontend for Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) generation, a semantic middle-end, and a runtime backend that synthesizes deterministic py_trees behavior trees. Mapping the standardized domain ontology directly to CARLA's procedural API via a custom method registry eliminates the need for external logic solvers. A demonstrative multi-actor cut-in and evasive maneuver, selected from a wider suite of validated scenarios, confirms the compiler's ability to process concurrent actions, dynamic mathematical expressions, and asynchronous signaling. This framework establishes a functional baseline for reproducible, large-scale SBT, paving the way for future C++ optimizations to mitigate current Python-based computational overhead.

</details>


### [286] [Learning-Based Sparsification of Dynamic Graphs in Robotic Exploration Algorithms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16509)
*Adithya V. Sastry,Bibek Poudel,Weizi Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 基于PPO训练的transformer框架用于剪枝机器人探索中的动态图，减少96%的图大小，实现更一致的探索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人探索算法依赖图结构进行前沿探索和动态路径规划，但图会快速增长并积累冗余信息，影响性能。

Method: 使用基于transformer的框架，通过近端策略优化（PPO）训练，在探索过程中对图进行剪枝，限制图增长并减少冗余信息积累。

Result: 在模拟环境中，学习到的策略将图大小减少高达96%；智能剪枝虽然探索率低于基线，但具有最低的标准差，在不同环境中实现最一致的探索。

Conclusion: 这是首次证明强化学习可用于机器人探索算法中动态图稀疏化的可行性，尽管奖励信号稀疏且延迟，但框架仍能学习将剪枝决策与探索结果关联。

Abstract: Many robotic exploration algorithms rely on graph structures for frontier-based exploration and dynamic path planning. However, these graphs grow rapidly, accumulating redundant information and impacting performance. We present a transformer-based framework trained with Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) to prune these graphs during exploration, limiting their growth and reducing the accumulation of excess information. The framework was evaluated on simulations of a robotic agent using Rapidly Exploring Random Trees (RRT) to carry out frontier-based exploration, where the learned policy reduces graph size by up to 96%. We find preliminary evidence that our framework learns to associate pruning decisions with exploration outcomes despite sparse, delayed reward signals. We also observe that while intelligent pruning achieves a lower rate of exploration compared to baselines, it yields the lowest standard deviation, producing the most consistent exploration across varied environments. To the best of our knowledge, these results are the first suggesting the viability of RL in sparsification of dynamic graphs used in robotic exploration algorithms.

</details>


### [287] [On-Orbit Space AI: Federated, Multi-Agent, and Collaborative Algorithms for Satellite Constellations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16518)
*Ziyang Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文综述了在轨空间AI领域，聚焦卫星星座从单星推理向星座级自主的转变，提出了三种协作范式：联邦学习、多智能体算法和协同感知与分布式推理，并建立了统一的系统级分类框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI研究主要关注单星推理，而卫星星座的自主化带来了全新的算法需求，包括动态星间连接、严格的SWaP-C限制、辐射故障、非独立同分布数据、概念漂移和安全关键约束等挑战。需要系统性地整合这一新兴领域的研究。

Method: 采用三种互补的协作范式：1) 联邦学习用于跨卫星训练、个性化和安全聚合；2) 多智能体算法用于协作规划、资源分配、调度、编队控制和碰撞避免；3) 协同感知与分布式推理用于多星融合、跟踪、分割/提前退出推理以及与星座网络的跨层协同设计。同时建立了统一的系统级视图和分类体系。

Result: 提出了一个全面的空间AI综述框架，将协作架构、时间机制和信任模型统一起来。创建了持续更新的资源库（GitHub）来支持社区发展并保持综述的可操作性。

Conclusion: 卫星星座正在向网络化、软件定义的平台转型，需要新的AI方法来实现星座级自主。该研究为在轨空间AI领域提供了系统化的分类框架和资源库，促进了该领域的进一步发展。

Abstract: Satellite constellations are transforming space systems from isolated spacecraft into networked, software-defined platforms capable of on-orbit perception, decision making, and adaptation. Yet much of the existing AI studies remains centered on single-satellite inference, while constellation-scale autonomy introduces fundamentally new algorithmic requirements: learning and coordination under dynamic inter-satellite connectivity, strict SWaP-C limits, radiation-induced faults, non-IID data, concept drift, and safety-critical operational constraints. This survey consolidates the emerging field of on-orbit space AI through three complementary paradigms: (i) {federated learning} for cross-satellite training, personalization, and secure aggregation; (ii) {multi-agent algorithms} for cooperative planning, resource allocation, scheduling, formation control, and collision avoidance; and (iii) {collaborative sensing and distributed inference} for multi-satellite fusion, tracking, split/early-exit inference, and cross-layer co-design with constellation networking. We provide a system-level view and a taxonomy that unifies collaboration architectures, temporal mechanisms, and trust models. To support community development and keep this review actionable over time, we continuously curate relevant papers and resources at https://github.com/ziyangwang007/AI4Space.

</details>


### [288] [Human Cognition in Machines: A Unified Perspective of World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16592)
*Timothy Rupprecht,Pu Zhao,Amir Taherin,Arash Akbari,Arman Akbari,Yumei He,Sean Duffy,Juyi Lin,Yixiao Chen,Rahul Chowdhury,Enfu Nan,Yixin Shen,Yifan Cao,Haochen Zeng,Weiwei Chen,Geng Yuan,Jennifer Dy,Sarah Ostadabbas,Silvia Zhang,David Kaeli,Edmund Yeh,Yanzhi Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 作者提出基于认知架构理论（CAT）的统一框架来评估世界模型，识别出现有研究中动机和元认知的不足，并提出新的"认知世界模型"分类。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有许多工作声称其世界模型具有"类人"认知能力，但缺乏基于认知架构理论的系统性评估框架。需要建立统一的理论基础来准确评估这些声称的能力。

Method: 提出基于认知架构理论（CAT）的概念统一框架，涵盖记忆、感知、语言、推理、想象、动机和元认知等所有认知功能。应用该分类法分析视频、具身和认知世界模型。

Result: 发现动机（特别是内在动机）和元认知领域研究严重不足，提出基于主动推理和全局工作空间理论的具体研究方向。引入"认知世界模型"新类别，涵盖基于结构化知识的科学发现智能体框架。

Conclusion: 该分类框架比现有分类法更能揭示研究空白，为未来世界模型研究提供了基于认知架构理论的理论指导和具体方向。

Abstract: This comprehensive report distinguishes prior works by the cognitive functions they innovate. Many works claim an almost "human-like" cognitive capability in their world models. To evaluate these claims requires a proper grounding in first principles in Cognitive Architecture Theory (CAT). We present a conceptual unified framework for world models that fully incorporates all the cognitive functions associated with CAT (i.e. memory, perception, language, reasoning, imagining, motivation, and meta-cognition) and identify gaps in the research as a guide for future states of the art. In particular, we find that motivation (especially intrinsic motivation) and meta-cognition remain drastically under-researched, and we propose concrete directions informed by active inference and global workspace theory to address them. We further introduce Epistemic World Models, a new category encompassing agent frameworks for scientific discovery that operate over structured knowledge. Our taxonomy, applied across video, embodied, and epistemic world models, suggests research directions where prior taxonomies have not.

</details>


### [289] [Emergency Stopping for Liquid-manipulating Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16667)
*Samuli Hynninen,Ville Kyrki*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于机器人操作开放容器中液体的紧急停止系统，能够在检测到危险时快速、无溢出的紧急制动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开放容器中的液体操作具有挑战性，因为液体对容器加速度和急动非常敏感。虽然无溢出液体操作已被广泛研究，但意外危险下的紧急停止却很少受到关注，尽管紧急制动可能导致危险的液体溢出。

Method: 将紧急停止问题表述为最优控制问题，在模型预测控制框架中求解，生成时间最优、无溢出的停止轨迹。该方法作为即插即用的安全层，可置于现有的无晃动运动规划方法之上，能够立即响应检测到的危险并考虑非线性液体动力学。

Result: 通过仿真和7-DoF Franka Emika Panda机器人实验证明，该方法能够实现快速紧急停止而不溢出液体。

Conclusion: 提出的紧急停止系统为机器人液体操作提供了重要的安全保障，能够在意外危险情况下快速响应，防止液体溢出，增强了机器人操作开放容器中液体的安全性和可靠性。

Abstract: Manipulating open liquid containers is challenging because liquids are highly sensitive to vessel accelerations and jerks. Although spill-free liquid manipulation has been widely studied, emergency stopping under unexpected hazards has received little attention, despite the fact that abrupt braking may cause hazardous spills. This letter presents an emergency stop system for robots manipulating liquids in open containers. We formulate emergency stopping as an optimal control problem and solve it in a model predictive control framework to generate time-optimal, spill-free stopping trajectories. The method operates as a plug-and-play safety layer on top of existing slosh-free motion planning methods, enabling immediate reaction to detected hazards while accounting for nonlinear liquid dynamics. We demonstrate, through simulation and on a 7-DoF Franka Emika Panda robot, that the proposed approach achieves fast emergency stopping without spilling.

</details>


### [290] [Diffusion-Based Optimization for Accelerated Convergence of Redundant Dual-Arm Minimum Time Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16670)
*Jushan Chen,Jonathan Fried,Santiago Paternain*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于扩散算法的框架，通过概率采样解决双冗余机械臂轨迹规划中的非凸高层问题，相比之前方法实现35倍速度提升和34%误差减少


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 之前的工作使用双层优化方法，其中梯度方法计算量大，且无法直接施加L∞笛卡尔误差约束，需要更高效的方法来解决这些问题

Method: 提出基于模型扩散算法的框架，采用概率采样方法处理非凸高层问题，相比之前的原始-对偶梯度方法，能够更有效地处理约束

Result: 相比之前方法，运行时间减少35倍，笛卡尔误差降低34%，显著提升了双冗余机械臂轨迹规划的效率

Conclusion: 扩散基概率采样框架能够有效解决双冗余机械臂轨迹规划中的非凸优化问题，在计算效率和精度方面都有显著提升

Abstract: We present a framework leveraging a novel variant of the model-based diffusion algorithm to minimize the time required for a redundant dual-arm robot configuration to follow a desired relative Cartesian path. Our prior work proposed a bi-level optimization approach for the dual-arm problem, where we derived the analytical solution to the lower-level convex sub-problem and solved the high-level nonconvex problem using a primal-dual approach. However, the gradient-based nature leads to a large computation overhead, and it prohibits directly imposing an $L_{\infty}$ Cartesian error constraint along the joint trajectory due to the sparsity of the gradient. In this work, we propose a diffusion-based framework that relies on probabilistic sampling to tackle the aforementioned challenges in the nonconvex high-level problem, leading to a 35x reduction in the runtime and 34\% less Cartesian error compared to our prior work.

</details>


### [291] [ReconVLA: An Uncertainty-Guided and Failure-Aware Vision-Language-Action Framework for Robotic Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16677)
*Lingling Chen,Zongyao Lyu,William J. Beksi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ReconVLA：为视觉-语言-动作模型引入保形预测，提供校准的不确定性估计和故障检测机制，提升机器人控制的可靠性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型缺乏对预测动作的置信度校准，限制了其在现实世界中的可靠性，因为无法预知不确定性和故障

Method: 在预训练VLA策略的动作token输出上直接应用保形预测，获得校准的不确定性估计；并将保形预测扩展到机器人状态空间，检测异常或不安全状态

Result: 在模拟和真实机器人实验中，ReconVLA能持续改善故障预期、减少灾难性错误，并提供校准的置信度度量，无需重新训练或修改底层VLA模型

Conclusion: ReconVLA通过保形预测为VLA模型提供了简单有效的可靠性增强机制，实现了不确定性引导和故障感知的控制信号

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have emerged as generalist robotic controllers capable of mapping visual observations and natural language instructions to continuous action sequences. However, VLAs provide no calibrated measure of confidence in their action predictions, thus limiting their reliability in real-world settings where uncertainty and failures must be anticipated. To address this problem we introduce ReconVLA, a reliable conformal model that produces uncertainty-guided and failure-aware control signals. Concretely, our approach applies conformal prediction directly to the action token outputs of pretrained VLA policies, yielding calibrated uncertainty estimates that correlate with execution quality and task success. Furthermore, we extend conformal prediction to the robot state space to detect outliers or unsafe states before failures occur, providing a simple yet effective failure detection mechanism that complements the action-level uncertainty. We evaluate ReconVLA in both simulation and real robot experiments across diverse manipulation tasks. Our results show that conformalized action predictions consistently improve failure anticipation, reduce catastrophic errors, and provide a calibrated measure of confidence without retraining or modifying the underlying VLA.

</details>


### [292] [Rewind-IL: Online Failure Detection and State Respawning for Imitation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16683)
*Gehan Zheng,Sanjay Seenivasan,Matthew Johnson-Roberson,Weiming Zhi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Rewind-IL是一种无需训练的在线安全框架，用于生成式动作块模仿策略，通过零样本故障检测和状态重置机制提高长时序操作任务的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模仿学习使机器人能从演示中学习复杂的视觉运动操作技能，但部署失败仍然是主要障碍。现有运行时监控器要么需要故障数据，要么在良性特征漂移时过度触发，要么只能检测故障而不提供恢复机制。

Method: Rewind-IL结合了基于时序块间差异估计的零样本故障检测器（使用分位数保形预测校准）和状态重置机制。离线阶段，视觉语言模型识别演示中的恢复检查点，并使用冻结策略编码器构建紧凑的检查点特征数据库。在线阶段，监控重叠动作块的自一致性，跟踪与检查点库的相似性，检测到故障时将执行回滚到最新已验证的安全状态。

Result: 在真实世界和模拟的长时序操作任务（包括向流匹配动作块策略的迁移）上的实验表明，策略内部一致性结合语义基础的重置为模仿学习的可靠性提供了实用途径。

Conclusion: Rewind-IL通过零样本故障检测和语义验证的状态重置机制，为生成式动作块模仿策略提供了有效的在线安全保障，提高了长时序操作任务的部署可靠性。

Abstract: Imitation learning has enabled robots to acquire complex visuomotor manipulation skills from demonstrations, but deployment failures remain a major obstacle, especially for long-horizon action-chunked policies. Once execution drifts off the demonstration manifold, these policies often continue producing locally plausible actions without recovering from the failure. Existing runtime monitors either require failure data, over-trigger under benign feature drift, or stop at failure detection without providing a recovery mechanism. We present Rewind-IL, a training-free online safeguard framework for generative action-chunked imitation policies. Rewind-IL combines a zero-shot failure detector based on Temporal Inter-chunk Discrepancy Estimate (TIDE), calibrated with split conformal prediction, with a state-respawning mechanism that returns the robot to a semantically verified safe intermediate state. Offline, a vision-language model identifies recovery checkpoints in demonstrations, and the frozen policy encoder is used to construct a compact checkpoint feature database. Online, Rewind-IL monitors self-consistency in overlapping action chunks, tracks similarity to the checkpoint library, and, upon failure, rewinds execution to the latest verified safe state before restarting inference from a clean policy state. Experiments on real-world and simulated long-horizon manipulation tasks, including transfer to flow-matching action-chunked policies, demonstrate that policy-internal consistency coupled with semantically grounded respawning offers a practical route to improved reliability in imitation learning. Supplemental materials are available at https://sjay05.github.io/rewind-il

</details>


### [293] [Autonomous Vehicle Collision Avoidance With Racing Parameterized Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16702)
*Shathushan Sivashangaran,Vihaan Dutta,Apoorva Khairnar,Sepideh Gohari,Azim Eskandarian*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的碰撞避免策略，通过赛车超车场景训练，无需显式几何轨迹引导，在仿真中实现了高效的车辆紧急避撞，并在硬件上实现了零样本迁移，计算效率显著优于传统控制方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 道路交通事故是全球主要致死原因，美国94%的碰撞由人为错误引起，每年造成7000多行人死亡和5000亿美元损失。自动驾驶车辆（AVs）需要高效的紧急碰撞避免系统，特别是在恶劣天气、网络安全威胁以及人车混行场景下。现有方法在非线性运动学精度和计算效率之间存在矛盾，需要一种既能准确处理车辆动力学又能实时计算的方法。

Method: 采用深度强化学习（DRL）参数化碰撞避免策略，使用赛车超车场景进行训练，不依赖显式几何轨迹引导。设计了物理信息且考虑模拟器利用的奖励函数来编码非线性车辆运动学。评估了两种策略：默认单向策略和反向航向策略（车辆与其他车反向行驶）。与基于模型预测控制和人工势场（MPC-APF）的基线方法进行对比。

Result: 两种DRL策略在三种交叉口碰撞场景中均一致优于MPC-APF基线，实现了零样本迁移到按比例缩放的硬件平台。计算效率显著提升：浮点运算减少31倍，推理延迟降低64倍。反向航向策略在正面碰撞中比默认赛车超车策略表现好30%，比基线好50%；在侧面碰撞中与默认策略相当。两种DRL策略的避撞能力比数值最优控制高10%。

Conclusion: 深度强化学习策略能够有效解决自动驾驶车辆紧急碰撞避免中的非线性运动学精度和计算效率双重约束问题。通过赛车超车场景训练的DRL策略在多种碰撞场景中优于传统控制方法，且计算效率显著更高，为零样本迁移到硬件平台提供了可行方案，为提升自动驾驶安全性提供了有效途径。

Abstract: Road traffic accidents are a leading cause of fatalities worldwide. In the US, human error causes 94% of crashes, resulting in excess of 7,000 pedestrian fatalities and $500 billion in costs annually. Autonomous Vehicles (AVs) with emergency collision avoidance systems that operate at the limits of vehicle dynamics at a high frequency, a dual constraint of nonlinear kinodynamic accuracy and computational efficiency, further enhance safety benefits during adverse weather and cybersecurity breaches, and to evade dangerous human driving when AVs and human drivers share roads. This paper parameterizes a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) collision avoidance policy Out-Of-Distribution (OOD) utilizing race car overtaking, without explicit geometric mimicry reference trajectory guidance, in simulation, with a physics-informed, simulator exploit-aware reward to encode nonlinear vehicle kinodynamics. Two policies are evaluated, a default uni-direction and a reversed heading variant that navigates in the opposite direction to other cars, which both consistently outperform a Model Predictive Control and Artificial Potential Function (MPC-APF) baseline, with zero-shot transfer to proportionally scaled hardware, across three intersection collision scenarios, at 31x fewer Floating Point Operations (FLOPS) and 64x lower inference latency. The reversed heading policy outperforms the default racing overtaking policy in head-to-head collisions by 30% and the baseline by 50%, and matches the former in side collisions, where both DRL policies evade 10% greater than numerical optimal control.

</details>


### [294] [LiDAR-based Crowd Navigation with Visible Edge Group Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16741)
*Allan Wang,Aaron Steinfeld*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文探索了在拥挤行人环境中使用基于群体的表示进行机器人导航的实际部署，提出了一种简化的可见边缘群体表示方法，在保持安全性和社交性的同时提高了计算速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在拥挤行人环境中进行机器人导航是一个挑战，现有方法要么在有限场景中使用群体表示，要么依赖容易受遮挡影响的外部检测模块，需要更鲁棒且实用的群体表示方法。

Method: 提出了可见边缘基于群体的表示方法，简化群体预测，并开发了相应的导航框架，通过模拟实验验证性能后在实际机器人上部署。

Result: 研究发现群体预测精度对拥挤环境中的导航性能影响不大；提出的简化群体表示在密集人群中实现了与现有方法相当的安全性和社交性，同时计算速度更快；在实际机器人部署中验证了基于群体表示的实际效益。

Conclusion: 简化的可见边缘群体表示在拥挤行人环境中是有效的，能够平衡导航性能与计算效率，为实际机器人部署提供了实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Robot navigation in crowded pedestrian environments is a well-known challenge and we explore the practical deployment of group-based representations in this setting. Pedestrian groups have been empirically shown to enable a mobile robot's navigation behavior to be safer and more social. However, existing approaches either explored groups only in limited scenarios with no high-density crowds or depended on external detection modules to track individuals, which are prone to noise and errors due to occlusions in crowds. We show that group prediction accuracy affects navigation performance only marginally in crowded environments. Based on this observation, we propose the visible edge-based group representation. We additionally demonstrate via simulation experiments that our navigation framework, integrated with the simplified group representation, performs comparatively in terms of safety and socialness in dense crowds, while achieving faster computation speed. Finally, we deploy our navigation framework on a real robot to explore the benefits of practically deploying group-based representations in the real world.

</details>


### [295] [LongBench: Evaluating Robotic Manipulation Policies on Real-World Long-Horizon Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16788)
*Xueyao Chen,Jingkai Jia,Tong Yang,Yibo Fu,Wei Li,Wenqiang Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: LongBench是一个真实世界的长时程操作基准测试，包含1000+真实场景，区分完全可观察和上下文依赖两种模式，用于评估执行鲁棒性、时序一致性和上下文推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人操作策略在长时间执行中性能会下降，但现有基准测试多为仿真环境或只报告总体成功率，难以分析真实世界中导致性能下降的具体原因，无法区分执行鲁棒性和上下文依赖推理等不同机制的问题。

Method: 引入LongBench真实世界基准测试，包含1000+真实场景，分为两种互补模式：上下文无关（完全可观察）和上下文依赖（模糊性驱动）。通过将任务组织为能力和模糊性特定子集，实现机制感知的评估，涵盖执行鲁棒性、时序一致性和上下文依赖推理。

Result: 评估6个最先进的策略发现，长时程性能并非由单一因素决定。在完全可观察设置中，性能与执行鲁棒性更相关；而上下文难度在不同任务中变化，记忆方法并未一致改善性能。

Conclusion: LongBench可作为研究长时程操作和开发在执
行和上下文挑战方面具有更强鲁棒性策略的有用基准测试。

Abstract: Robotic manipulation policies often degrade over extended horizons, yet existing benchmarks provide limited insight into why such failures occur. Most prior benchmarks are either simulation-based or report aggregate success, making it difficult to disentangle the distinct sources of temporal difficulty in real-world execution. We introduce LongBench, a real-world benchmark for evaluating long-horizon manipulation. LongBench consists of over 1,000 real-world episodes, covering two complementary regimes: Context-Independent (fully observable) and Context-Dependent (ambiguity-driven). By organizing tasks into capability- and ambiguity-specific subsets, LongBench enables mechanism-aware evaluation of execution robustness, temporal consistency, and context-dependent reasoning.
